action.reasoning: Observation: train.py failed due to missing logs/iter_1/ dir for metrics.jsonl (RAB_ITERATION env handling issue); test_enhance.py (soundfile-based, avoids torchaudio codec error) and predict.py exist but predict.py unverified for exact eval contract; MetricGAN+ checkpoint copied successfully in prior run, model loads offline. Analysis: MetricGAN+ is strong SE baseline (expected val PESQ ~2.8+); root cause of failure is missing os.makedirs for logs; predict.py must exactly follow arg parsing, load from --checkpoint dir, process test_files.txt from noisy/, save 16kHz WAVs with identical names, output JSON with absolute predictions_dir. Decision: rewrite train.py (create logs dir via env var, dummy metrics, prepare checkpoint), rewrite predict.py (full self-contained implementation matching contract, GPU support, soundfile I/O), run test_enhance.py for val PESQ+timing baseline, then submit_eval with metricgan_checkpoint to get official score and measure iter time before further optimization.
